allow: Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('/home/riccardo/code/robo-boy/package-lock.json'\); const pkgs = lock.packages; Object.entries\(pkgs\).forEach\(\([k, v]\) => { if \(v.dependencies && Object.keys\(v.dependencies\).some\(d => d === 'socket.io-parser'\)\) console.log\(k\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const v = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('latest workbox-build:', v.version\); const deps = v.dependencies || {}; console.log\('@rollup/plugin-terser:', deps['@rollup/plugin-terser']\); console.log\('serialize-javascript:', deps['serialize-javascript']\);")

Bash(node -e "const v = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('latest version:', v.version\); const deps = v.dependencies || {}; console.log\('serialize-javascript:', deps['serialize-javascript']\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(v.peerDependencies\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const v = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('version:', v.version\); const deps = v.dependencies || {}; console.log\('all deps:', JSON.stringify\(deps\)\); console.log\('peerDeps:', JSON.stringify\(v.peerDependencies\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const v = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('9.x:', v.filter\(x => x.startsWith\('9.'\)\).slice\(-5\)\); console.log\('10.x:', v.filter\(x => x.startsWith\('10.'\)\).slice\(-5\)\); console.log\('latest:', v[v.length-1]\);")
